license: Use the upstream PDOK / Kadaster 3D Basisvoorziening terms (CC BY 4.0).
notes: Monolithic real-geometry Basisvoorziening 3D case stored as a whole CityJSON file. It complements the 3DBAG baseline with a larger terrain-inclusive Dutch tile acquired directly from the published 2022 PDOK collection.
preprocessing: Run the shared Basisvoorziening 3D acquisition script in cityjson-corpus.
Download the pinned 2022 volledig archive from PDOK.
Extract the published CityJSON tile from the zip archive.
Export a sibling live cityjson-arrow stream file for Arrow-to-memory and memory-to-Arrow benchmarking.
Export a sibling cityjson-parquet package file for package-to-memory and memory-to-package benchmarking.
reference: Use `just acquire-basisvoorziening-3d` in cityjson-corpus to materialize the raw tile and native cityjson-arrow/cityjson-parquet artifacts.
